nasb.text: and shall dedicate to the Lord his days as a Nazirite, and shall bring a male lamb a year old for a guilt offering; but the former days will be void because his separation was defiled.

esv.text: and separate himself to the Lord for the days of his separation and bring a male lamb a year old for a guilt offering. But the previous period shall be void, because his separation was defiled.

cnv.text: 使他重新離俗歸耶和華的日子，又要帶一隻一歲的公羊羔來作贖愆祭；以前的日子無效，因為他的離俗被玷污了。

ccb.text: 重新开始过奉献给耶和华的日子，还要带一只一岁的公羊羔作赎过祭。他以前做拿细耳人的日子无效，因为他沾染了不洁之物。
